name: descuentos-santiago
description: DDD hexagonal platform to manage discounts across Santiago, Chile

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @descuentos-santiago/api" "npm run dev -w @descuentos-santiago/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @descuentos-santiago/domain && npm run build -w @descuentos-santiago/application && npm run build -w @descuentos-santiago/infrastructure && npm run build -w @descuentos-santiago/api && npm run build -w @descuentos-santiago/web
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run lint
